source_jobs.title: iOS Engineer
source_jobs.description:
COME JOIN US AT INTRO

Intro is growing our team of amazing people who are on a mission to give everyone access to anyone, empowering each other to create a better world. Intro started in 2022 by first building a tool for the world’s top founders and experts, enabling their audiences from all over the world to be able to access them, jump on a live video call, and get personalized advice. We were (and still are) grateful to see that it was an INSTANT hit. 

Today, we have over 20k five star  ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ reviews, and the founders of Reddit, Zillow, Sweetgreen, DryBar, and 1k+ more all became partners, as well as advocates of our product, company, and mission. We then launched a marketplace, chat, subscriptions, and more, each leading to faster growth. 

We’re just getting started — the Intro of tomorrow will look very different than the Intro of today. In fact, we’re confident that Intro will become the go-to network for access, knowledge, and…(we can’t say the last part just yet), all over the world.

If you’re interested in joining an amazing company that is growing (fast), loved by its users, and deeply cares about quality, we’d love to meet you. 




TEAM

Hey everyone! it’s Raad, CEO at Intro 👋

Our team is world-class. It’s the best team I’ve ever worked with because everyone here is (1) a good person who cares about the mission (2) they’re functionally great at their craft, and (3) they help each other out! It’s a very no-drama type of place which is what happens when everyone is really good at what they do.

In their past careers, people on our team helped create or build major products like QuickBooks Online, Uber Eats, Calm, and more.  We love working on BIG problems for a LOT of people and believe that Intro will be the most impactful yet. 




We are seeking a skilled iOS Engineer to join our growing team. You will be responsible for building and maintaining our iOS application, working closely with product, design, and backend teams to deliver high-quality features and a seamless user experience.

Key Responsibilities:

 - Develop, test, and maintain our iOS application using Swift and SwiftUI

 - Collaborate with product managers and designers to implement new features and improve existing ones

 - Ensure the performance, quality, and responsiveness of the app by writing clean, efficient, and maintainable code

 - Work with the backend team to integrate APIs and services

 - Conduct code reviews and provide constructive feedback to peers

 - Troubleshoot and debug issues to optimize app performance

 - Stay up-to-date with the latest iOS development trends and tools

What We're Looking For:

 - 5+ years of experience in iOS development.

 - Strong proficiency in Swift and SwiftUI.

 - Experience with iOS frameworks.

 - Familiarity with RESTful APIs

 - Experience with unit testing, automated testing, and CI/CD pipelines.

 - Strong problem-solving skills and a passion for creating high-quality user experiences.

 - Good communication skills and a collaborative mindset.

 - Experience using AI Agents and AI tools.

 - Reliably able to ship bug free code.



OUR INVESTORS

We’re backed by Andreessen Horowitz (A16Z), 776, Alexis Ohanian (founder of Reddit), Tiffany Haddish, Kevin Durant, and a group of world-class investors.




COMPANY VALUES

 - Impress the customer

 - Be successful as a company

 - Be creative, inventive, and scrappy

 - Keep it simple and execute

 - Take a moment to understand others

 - Feedback should make us stronger, not weaker

 - Ideas are important. Execution is 10x more important.

 - Stay grateful 




WHY WORK WITH US?

On your first day, we’ll do a few exercises to help you identify your life goals. We’ll ask questions like “what do you imagine your life looking like if you achieved all of your goals” and “why are those goals important to you?” Once we identify these, they become our goals and we will work together to help make them a reality.



Next, we’ll ask you about things that

It’s a very no-drama type of place which is what happens when everyone is really good at what they do.

In their past careers, people on our team helped create or build major products like QuickBooks Online, Uber Eats, Calm, and more.  We love working on BIG problems for a LOT of people and believe that Intro will be the most impactful yet. 




KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

 - Onboarding & Profile Completion: Guide new experts through the signup and onboarding process, ensuring profiles are complete and optimized for a successful launch.

 - Social Media Launch Coordination: Coordinate with experts to develop and schedule social media announcements, and draft compelling social media assets to maximize engagement and visibility.

 - Community Engagement & Relationship Management:
   
   - Maintain and strengthen relationships with experts by encouraging additional social posts and nurturing a community of engagement.
   
   - Identify opportunities for experts to refer other key individuals to the platform, supporting organic growth and quality referrals.


QUALIFICATIONS:

 - 2+ years of experience in community management, social media, or a customer success role, preferably within a tech or online platform environment

 - Exceptional interpersonal and communication skills, with a knack for building and maintaining relationships

 - Experience coordinating social media content and engagement strategies

 - Goal oriented with a track record of exceeding targets

 - Familiarity with CRM software and willingness to build processes

 - Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to think critically and creatively

 - Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to build rapport and trust with clients

 - High degree of adaptability 

 - Ability to work in the office 3 days per week



OUR INVESTORS

We’re backed by Andreessen Horowitz (A16Z), 776, Alexis Ohanian (founder of Reddit), Tiffany Haddish, Kevin Durant, and a group of world-class investors.

Our team is world-class. It’s the best team I’ve ever worked with because everyone here is (1) a good person who cares about the mission (2) they’re functionally great at their craft, and (3) they help each other out! It’s a very no-drama type of place which is what happens when everyone is really good at what they do.

In their past careers, people on our team helped create or build major products like QuickBooks Online, Uber Eats, Calm, and more.  We love working on BIG problems for a LOT of people and believe that Intro will be the most impactful yet. 




THE ROLE

 - Create high-impact short-form video for social platforms, with a strong point of view

 - Own post-production across performance campaigns and editorial content

 - Lead the full edit: from structure and pacing to motion, sound design, and final polish

 - Execute against Intro’s brand guidelines while staying native to platform trends and formats

 - Manage deliverables independently with detailed specs and fast turnarounds

 - Publish and optimize content with strong visuals, metadata, and copy

 - Develop and test new video formats that drive engagement and audience growth

 - Thrive in a fast-moving, async environment where speed, taste, and scrappiness matter

 - Collaborate closely with a world-class team of creative entrepreneurs

 - This is a hands-on, execution-heavy freelance role with room to shape formats and creative direction


WHAT YOU BRING

 - You have strong creator instincts and a clear sense of what performs on social

 - You know how to hook attention in the first few seconds – and earn the rest

 - You use sound design and pacing intentionally to elevate your edits

 - You can take a loose brief and raw footage and turn it into sharp, compelling work

 - You’re fluent in modern post-production workflows, from edit to delivery

 - You work fast, manage your own time well, and consistently hit tight timelines

 - You stay current on emerging formats, tools, and creator-led trends

 - You collaborate well – comfortable taking notes, iterating quickly, and pitching ideas

 - You understand the fundamentals of marketing, brand, and storytelling


REQUIREMENTS

 - 5+ years of experience as a professional video editor (or equivalent real-world experience)

 - Strong hands-on experience in Adobe Premiere and/or Final Cut Pro

 - A solid portfolio of short-form video, ideally for social and marketing use cases

 - Deep familiarity with major social platforms and their native video formats

 - Comfort working with async teams and tools like Figma, Frame, and Dropbox


NICE TO HAVE

 - Proficiency across Adobe Creative Suite

 - Experience editing for performance marketing or conversion-oriented campaigns

 - Familiarity with AI-powered video and creativ

THE ROLE

 - Research, write, and edit high-quality content for marketing and editorial projects

 - Support projects spanning blog, SEO, social, landing pages, lifecycle, and special initiatives

 - Use AI tools to accelerate research and production – while ensuring every piece has a clear, human voice and point of view

 - Translate complex ideas about company-building into clear, engaging, and credible writing

 - Manage a significant production workload with tight deadlines

 - Collaborate closely with cross-functional partners while owning deliverables independently

 - Thrive in a fast-moving, async environment where speed, judgment, and taste matter

 - This is a hands-on, execution-heavy contract role for a writer deeply engaged in entrepreneurship and business-building


WHAT YOU BRING

 - You’re a versatile writer, editor, and researcher with strong editorial instincts

 - You’re deeply engaged with entrepreneurship and how startups are funded, built, and scaled

 - You know how to use AI as a writing partner – without sacrificing human originality and voice

 - You can take a loose brief and turn it into sharp, well-structured, on-brand content

 - You write clearly, edit relentlessly, and tailor tone and structure for different channels and audiences

 - You have strong judgment around what’s engaging, useful, and worth publishing

 - You work fast, manage your own time well, and consistently hit deadlines

 - You’re comfortable collaborating closely, receiving feedback, and iterating quickly

 - You understand the fundamentals of marketing, brand, and storytelling


REQUIREMENTS

 - 5+ years of experience as a professional writer, editor, or content marketer

 - A strong portfolio of written work across content marketing, editorial, or brand channels

 - Demonstrated experience writing about startups, entrepreneurship, or business-building

 - Fluency with AI tools for research, ideation, and production workflows

 - Experience working independently in a contract or freelance capacity


NICE TO HAVE

 - Experience writing for founder, operator, or B2B audiences

 - Familiarity with SEO, lifecycle, and/or growth marketing best practices

 - Experience collaborating

 - Execute multiple assignments in parallel with fast, reliable turnaround

 - Build and maintain a well-organized library of design assets

 - Translate briefs and brand guidelines into clean, effective creative

 - Thrive in a fast-moving, async environment where speed, taste, and scrappiness matter

 - You can take a loose brief and turn it into polished, on-brand creative

 - A strong portfolio showing work across multiple campaigns and channels

 - Comfort using AI tools for design ideation, iteration, and production

 - Experience working independently in a contract or freelance capacity


NICE TO HAVE

 - Deep proficiency across Adobe Creative Suite; After Effects is a plus

 - Familiarity with emerging AI-powered design tools and workflows

 - Illustration skills, motion graphics experience


COMPENSATION

$50–$100/hour, depending on experience and skills

Role Overview:

We are looking for a Senior/Staff level Backend Engineer to design, build, and maintain scalable backend systems that power our product. You will work closely with cross-functional teams to deliver robust and reliable solutions.
 

Key Responsibilities:

 - Design and implement backend services and APIs that are scalable, reliable, and secure.

 - Collaborate with frontend engineers, product managers, and designers to define and build new features.

 - Optimize performance and scalability of the backend systems.

 - Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code.

 - Conduct code reviews, provide feedback, and mentor junior engineers.

 - Identify technical debt and provide recommendations for improvements.

What We're Looking For:

 - 5+ years of experience in backend development.

 - Strong experience with Go, or similar backend languages.

 - Expertise in RESTful APIs.

 - Experience building ecommerce / payment systems.

 - Proficiency in SQL databases (e.g., PostgreSQL).

 - Familiarity with cloud platforms like AWS, GCP, or Azure.

 - Experience with CI/CD pipelines and test automation.

 - Excellent problem-solving skills and attention to detail.

 - Strong communication and collaboration skills.

 - Extensive experience using AI Agents and AI tools.

 - Reliably able to ship bug free code.



OUR INVESTORS

We’re backed by Andreessen Horowitz (A16Z), 776, Alexis Ohanian (founder of Reddit), Tiffany Haddish, Kevin Durant, and a group of world-class investors.

source_jobs.title: Creator in Residence (TikTok & Instagram)
source_jobs.description:
COME JOIN US AT INTRO

Intro is growing our team of amazing people who are on a mission to give everyone access to anyone, empowering each other to create a better world. Intro started in 2022 by first building a tool for the world’s top founders and experts, enabling their audiences from all over the world to be able to access them, jump on a live video call, and get personalized advice. We were (and still are) grateful to see that it was an INSTANT hit. 

Today, we have over 20k five star  ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ reviews, and the founders of Reddit, Zillow, Sweetgreen, DryBar, and 1k+ more all became partners, as well as advocates of our product, company, and mission. We then launched a marketplace, chat, subscriptions, and more, each leading to faster growth.

If you’re interested in joining an amazing company that is growing (fast), loved by its users, and deeply cares about quality, we’d love to meet you. 




TEAM

Hey everyone! it’s Raad, CEO at Intro 👋

Our team is world-class. It’s the best team I’ve ever worked with because everyone here is (1) a good person who cares about the mission (2) they’re functionally great at their craft, and (3) they help each other out! It’s a very no-drama type of place which is what happens when everyone is really good at what they do.

In their past careers, people on our team helped create or build major products like QuickBooks Online, Uber Eats, Calm, and more.  We love working on BIG problems for a LOT of people and believe that Intro will be the most impactful yet. 




THE ROLE – CREATOR IN RESIDENCE (TIKTOK & INSTAGRAM)

We’re building a world-class brand and we’re looking for a Creator in Residence to help us bring it to life on TikTok and Instagram. You’re a natural on camera. You’ve built an audience (your own or someone else’s). You know how to entertain, educate, and engage. And you do it all with taste.

Our brand is elevated, inspiring, and rooted in real stories from the world’s top experts and founders. We’re looking for someone who can translate that energy into short-form video that doesn’t just get views—but actually drives excitement and conversion. Here’s what we’re thinking:

 - You’ve built a personal or professional brand on TikTok, Instagram, or Youtube to 20k+ followers

 - You’re great on camera and can also direct or guide others to be

 - You can turn raw ideas into polished video content

 - You know how to make content that aligns with a brand's voice and visual identity

 - You have a solid grasp of the tools of narrative, pacing, and sound design

 - You know how to batch, schedule, and publish short-form video at a high quality and cadence

 - You live and breathe internet culture and you know how to riff on trends


IDEAL REQUIREMENTS

 - 1–3 years of experience as a creator or content producer for social media

 - A proven track record of building an engaged following on TikTok, Instagram, or Youtube

 - Strong video editing skills (Adobe Premiere, CapCut, or similar tools)

 - Deep understanding of storytelling and visual pacing for short-form

 - Comfortable in front of the camera and/or directing on-camera talent

 - A strong eye for quality and detail in graphics, sound design, and editing techniques

 - Bonus: experience producing UGC or founder-led content

 - Bonus: you’ve built content that drives conversion, not just likes

 - Bonus: you’ve built content for brands in the startup, tech, or creator economy space



OUR INVESTORS

We’re backed by Andreessen Horowitz (A16Z), 776, Alexis Ohanian (founder of Reddit), Tiffany Haddish, Kevin Durant, and a group of world-class investors.




COMPANY VALUES

 - Impress the customer

 - Be successful as a company

 - Be creative, inventive, and scrappy

 - Keep it

source_jobs.description:
COME JOIN US AT INTRO

Intro started in 2022 by first building a tool for the world’s top founders and experts, enabling their audiences from all over the world to be able to access them, jump on a live video call, and get personalized advice. Today, we have over 20k five star  ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ reviews, and the founders of Reddit, Zillow, Sweetgreen, DryBar, and 1k+ more all became partners, as well as advocates of our product, company, and mission. We then launched a marketplace, chat, subscriptions, and more, each leading to faster growth.

If you’re interested in joining an amazing company that is growing (fast), loved by its users, and deeply cares about quality, we’d love to meet you. 




TEAM

Hey everyone! it’s Raad, CEO at Intro 👋

Our team is world-class. It’s the best team I’ve ever worked with because everyone here is (1) a good person who cares about the mission (2) they’re functionally great at their craft, and (3) they help each other out! It’s a very no-drama type of place which is what happens when everyone is really good at what they do.

In their past careers, people on our team helped create or build major products like QuickBooks Online, Uber Eats, Calm, and more.  We love working on BIG problems for a LOT of people and believe that Intro will be the most impactful yet. 



Founding Product Designer Responsibilities:

 - Drive the design process from ideation to execution for mobile and web platforms

 - Create intuitive, user-centered designs through research, wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity visuals

 - Collaborate closely with product, engineering, and other stakeholders to iterate and refine product features

 - Develop and maintain a cohesive design system to ensure consistency across the platform

 - Conduct user research and usability testing to gather insights and validate design decisions

 - Mentor junior designers, fostering a culture of design excellence and continuous improvement

What We're Looking For:

 - 5+ years of experience in product design, with a strong portfolio showcasing impactful mobile and web designs

 - Mastery of design tools like Figma, Sketch, or Adobe XD and proficiency in creating interactive prototypes

 - Strong understanding of interaction design, visual design, and UX principles

 - Proven experience in user research, usability testing, and translating insights into actionable design improvements

 - Ability to work autonomously and collaborate effectively in a fast-paced, agile environment

 - Excellent communication skills to present and justify design decisions clearly



OUR INVESTORS

We’re backed by Andreessen Horowitz (A16Z), 776, Alexis Ohanian (founder of Reddit), Tiffany Haddish, Kevin Durant, and a group of world-class investors.




COMPANY VALUES

 - Impress the customer

 - Be successful as a company

 - Be creative, inventive, and scrappy

 - Keep it simple and execute

 - Take a moment to understand others

 - Feedback should make us stronger, not weaker

 - Ideas are important. Execution is 10x more important.

 - Stay grateful 




WHY WORK WITH US?

On your first day, we’ll do a few exercises to help you identify your life goals. We’ll ask questions like “what do you imagine your life looking like if you achieved all of your goals” and “why are those goals important to you?” Once we identify these, they become our goals and we will work together to help make them a reality.



Next, we’ll ask you about things that matter to you in the short term. These could be things like a gym mem

source_jobs.title: Head of Brand Design
source_jobs.description:
COME JOIN US AT INTRO

Intro is growing our team of amazing people who are on a mission to give everyone access to anyone, empowering each other to create a better world. Intro started in 2022 by first building a tool for the world’s top founders and experts, enabling their audiences from all over the world to be able to access them, jump on a live video call, and get personalized advice. We were (and still are) grateful to see that it was an INSTANT hit. 

Today, we have over 20k five star  ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ reviews, and the founders of Reddit, Zillow, Sweetgreen, DryBar, and 1k+ more all became partners, as well as advocates of our product, company, and mission. We then launched a marketplace, chat, subscriptions, and more, each leading to faster growth. 

We’re just getting started — the Intro of tomorrow will look very different than the Intro of today. In fact, we’re confident that Intro will become the go-to network for access, knowledge, and…(we can’t say the last part just yet), all over the world.

If you’re interested in joining an amazing company that is growing (fast), loved by its users, and deeply cares about quality, we’d love to meet you. 




TEAM

Hey everyone! it’s Raad, CEO at Intro 👋

Our team is world-class. It’s the best team I’ve ever worked with because everyone here is (1) a good person who cares about the mission (2) they’re functionally great at their craft, and (3) they help each other out! It’s a very no-drama type of place which is what happens when everyone is really good at what they do.

In their past careers, people on our team helped create or build major products like QuickBooks Online, Uber Eats, Calm, and more.  We love working on BIG problems for a LOT of people and believe that Intro will be the most impactful yet. 




THE ROLE

As the Head of Brand Design, you will be the architect of Intro's visual universe. This is a high-impact leadership role that requires a "player-coach" mentality. You will set the global creative vision while remaining deeply "in the tools" to execute handcrafted, premium design work at a high-volume output.

 - Own the Visual Identity: Define and evolve the Intro brand aesthetic across every touchpoint – ensuring it feels striking, elevated, and authoritative.

 - Creative Excellence: Push our brand expression forward with exceptional taste, craft, and a high bar for visual excellence.

 - High-Volume Execution: Lead the hands-on creation of stellar assets for paid ads, organic social, lifecycle marketing, blog, and web. You have the ability to produce assets, but can also work with contractors or other members of the team to accelerate your efforts.

 - Social Storytelling: Develop striking visual formats for organic social that turn expert knowledge into scroll-stopping experiences – blending premium typography, motion, and AI-assisted art to build a cult-following.

 - Performance Creative: Drive a high-output engine of engaging visual formats that push the boundaries of performance marketing; you will constantly iterate on thumb-stopping creative that converts while maintaining brand integrity.

 - Systems Thinking: Build and maintain a world-class brand system to allow for rapid, high-quality scaling.

 - AI-Native Workflow: Actively use and experiment with AI design and automation tools to accelerate ideation and production. You must be someone who is open and eager to use AI to transform the creative process.

 - Product/UX Flex: Apply your aesthetic lens to landing pages and other extensions of product, ensuring the user experience matches the premium promise of the brand.

 - Collaboration: Work with the CEO and founding team to translate business goals into visual stories, collaborating with a network of contractors, creators, and world-class experts.




THE PERSON IN THE ROLE

You have a book of work that demonstrates exceptional craft at a premium level. We do not care about where you worked before, but your talent and drive must be 10x.

 - You Are a Ma

notes: Intro is a startup with a mix of tech and non-tech roles, with a strong focus on design and marketing. The company has a small team and is hiring for various positions.
